# Sparkle

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Sparkle;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Sparkle { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
star, effect, filter, night, magic, shiny, glitter, twinkle, celebration

## Categories
shapes

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sparkle)
